articles.title: Meteor Garden star Van Ness Wu announces surprise marriage; reveals he has found ‘the most important person’ - view pics
articles.description: Singer and actor Van Ness Wu has surprised fans by announcing his marriage without any prior dating rumours. The actor, best known for playing Mei Zuo in the hit Taiwanese drama Meteor Garden, shared the happy news through a heartfelt social media post, catching fans completely off guard.

articles.title: Vikrant Massey turns producer for Netflix’s 'Musafir Cafe'; teaser out

articles.title: Sara Foster on David Foster and Katharine McPhee’s age difference
articles.description: Sara Foster wholeheartedly backs her father, David Foster, in his marriage to Katharine McPhee, pushing aside any doubts about their 35-year age difference. She praised McPhee for being 'amazing' and emphasized their incredible connection. Additionally, she noted how gracefully McPhee embraces her role as a stepmother after their seven years together, which began when they met on the set of 'American Idol'.

articles.title: What's Happening With Sam Altman's Biopic? | TechPulse
articles.description: Amazon reportedly dropped Artificial, a $40 million film directed by Luca Guadagnino (Call Me by Your Name, Challengers) and starring Andrew Garfield as Sam Altman, Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk, Cooper Koch as Ilya Sutskever and Yura Borisov as OpenAI co-founder Ilya Sutskever's colleague.The film recreates the dramatic five days in 2023 when OpenAI's board fired CEO Sam Altman, only to reinstate him less than a week later.In this video, we explore why Amazon walked away from the project, why Netflix, A24 and several other studios also reportedly passed on it, and why the timing has sparked a much bigger debate about AI's growing influence in Hollywood.As AI companies become major investors, strategic partners and infrastructure providers for the entertainment industry, can studios still tell stories about those same companies without raising difficult questions about independence?The film may still find a home with Neon, but the conversation surrounding Artificial has already become almost as interesting as the movie itself.

articles.title: National Doctors’ Day 2026: Date, theme, significance and 20+ wishes to honour doctors
articles.description: National Doctors’ Day 2026 is celebrated on July 1 in India to honour doctors and remember Dr Bidhan Chandra Roy for his contributions to medicine and society. The day highlights the importance of doctors, their hard work, and the need to support their physical and mental well-being.

articles.title: Theatre doyen Vijaya Mehta dies in Mumbai at 91
articles.description: Vijaya Mehta directed Ajab Nyaya Cartulacha, an adaptation of Bertolt Brecht's The Caucasian Chalk Circle, which won audiences and critics at the Brecht festival in Berlin in 1973.

articles.title: PM Modi mourns passing of theatre legend Vijaya Mehta, a 'towering' personality
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi paid tribute to veteran Marathi theatre legend Vijaya Mehta, who passed away at 91. He remembered her as a 'towering' personality and a pioneer of modern Marathi theatre, known for her commitment to artistic excellence.

articles.title: ‘Do not pick it up’: Actor Madhavan shares warning about poisonous seashell. It looks like a beautiful souvenir, but can be deadly
articles.description: Actor R Madhavan has issued a stark warning about collecting seashells, specifically cone snails. These seemingly beautiful souvenirs harbor a deadly secret: a harpoon-like tooth capable of injecting potent venom. Even empty shells can be dangerous, as the apparatus remains active and can inject paralyzing toxins if handled improperly. There is currently no known antivenom for these stings.

articles.title: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' final runtime revealed!
articles.description: Tom Holland's 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' is set for a July release, with early reports suggesting a runtime of 2 hours and 24 minutes. This would make it the second-longest live-action Spider-Man film, just shy of 'No Way Home'. The synopsis hints at a transformed Peter Parker battling an unseen threat after the world forgets him. Directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, this marks Holland's fourth solo Spidey adventure.

articles.title: Why did LeBron James’ father Anthony McClelland leave him shortly after his birth? Inside his mother’s sacrifices that shaped his childhood
articles.description: LeBron James grew up without the support of his biological father, Anthony McClelland, who was absent throughout his childhood. His mother, Gloria James, raised him as a single parent despite financial struggles and constant challenges. With her support, along with help from trusted mentors, LeBron built the strong foundation that eventually helped him become one of basketball’s greatest players.

articles.title: Blake Lively wins in court but loses a spot at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding
articles.description: Blake Lively has secured a significant legal victory, demanding over $8 million in fees from Justin Baldoni following his dismissed defamation lawsuit. However, despite this win, reports indicate Lively will not be attending Taylor Swift's upcoming wedding. Sources suggest their once-close friendship has cooled considerably, with Lively understanding her absence from the celebrations.

articles.description: Veteran Marathi theatre doyenne Vijaya Mehta passed away at 91. Anupam Kher shared the news, paying an emotional tribute to the pioneering director and actor who reshaped modern Indian theatre and cinema and with whom he worked in several films.

articles.title: Lock Upp 2: Shreya Kalra reveals Akanksha Chamola's big secret to Sufi Motiwala; says 'She's bi-se*ual'
articles.description: In a dramatic turn of events on Lock Upp 2, contestant Shreya Kalra has spilled the beans about Akanksha Chamola's alleged bisexuality to Sufi Motiwala as a calculated act of payback. This revelation follows Akanksha's public announcement of her divorce from Gaurav Khanna, who has been vocal about his unwavering love and support for her. Contestants are permitted to use such secrets strategically as 'lifelines' in the game.

articles.title: Anupam Kher mourns Vijaya Mehta: ‘She raised your standards’
articles.description: Veteran Indian theatre director, actor and filmmaker Vijaya Mehta passed away on Tuesday night due to age-related ailments. She was 91. Affectionately known as "Bai" in theatre circles, Mehta breathed her last at her residence in South Mumbai. Veteran actor Anupam Kher took to social media to mourn the loss of his mentor and collaborator.

articles.title: Veteran theatre director Vijaya Mehta dies at 92
Quote of the day by French novelist Honore de Balzac on marriage: 'The more one judges, the less one loves' - Famous writer's lessons on happiness, unhappiness in marriages
articles.description: French novelist Honoré de Balzac's timeless quote of the day, 'The more one judges, the less one loves,' from his 1829 work, 'The Physiology of Marriage,' offers a crucial insight into relationships. He argued that initial romance thrives on overlooking flaws, but marriage's reality exposes imperfections, leading to judgment that erodes love.

'The Life' is sung by Vaikom Vijayalakshmi and music of the song is given by Ravi Basrur. Lyrics of 'Blast' song 'The Life' are written by Madhurakavi. To know more about 'The Life' song from Arjun, Preity Mukundhan and Abhirami starrer 'Blast' watch the video.
